title: A few reminders about the midterm
content:
Hi everyone,

 

Just a friendly reminder that your midterm will be held remotely during our scheduled class time tomorrow, October 14. As a result, there will be no in-person class tomorrow. You can take it at home or anywhere else you like.

Please ensure that you have Proctorio installed and ready to go. The midterm will consist of 20 multiple-choice questions covering the topics discussed in class and the lecture slides. Your reading assignments will help you review the types of questions asked on the midterm, though the exam questions are generally more application-oriented. I will make sure to incorporate the ADA requests in advance.

 

Wishing you all best of luck,
Sina
contentText:

author: Sina Sokhan
